creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #4)

Is the path to /usr/include/c++/v1/unwind.h always in the includes path list?

cad/nvc fails to find unwind.h in configure and devel/libunwind doesn't help.

Is this because they use C code and /usr/include/c++/v1/unwind.h is only available in C++?
